title: TMC Psychologist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
short_info: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) Psychologist Notification 2026 has been released on 28 May 2026 on the official website of Tata Memorial Centre. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TMC Psychologist Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree in a relevant field with a mandatory experience of 3 years in the relevant field, including one year of experience in an oncology department. OR Graduate Degree in a relevant field with a mandatory experience of 3 years in the relevant field, including one year of experience in an oncology department.

salary_details.details: Rs. 39,000/- to Rs. 47,000/- p.m. depending on qualification and experience.

selection_process: MCQ Test (if more candidates) Walk-in Interview
